market_context: X sentiment shows caution amid 13% BTC drop and VIX rise, with traders citing macro uncertainty. Pre-market futures mixed, tech under pressure from recent earnings misses. No major events but options flow indicates defensive positioning in indices.

predictions.reasoning: SPY likely to close lower due to crypto weakness spilling into equities and VIX up 3.8% signaling caution per X chatter and futures data.
NVDA faces selling pressure from broader tech rotation and short interest signals seen in recent options flow.
TSLA may rebound on retail optimism visible in X volume despite market headwinds.
BTC continues its 5-day decline with negative X sentiment and no reversal catalysts in pre-market data.
